title: Fresh Look: Better HUD
description: The resource pack improves the HUD icons
body:
![FL HUD Modrinth Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4c40b3f2cce3e84e901c2e8b1534af9d236e7a2_0.webp)

# Fresh Look: HUD
Fresh Look: HUD refreshes all HUD icons and bars, making them brighter and more visually expressive.

The resource pack improves (as of the version 1.1.0):
- **Heats bar** (regular, absorbing, poisoned, withered, frozen + **hardcore versions**)
- **Food bar**
- **Armor bar**
- **Air bar**
- **XP bar**
- **Jump bar**
- **Crosshair**

![FL HUD Modrinth Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e42a11c56670dd5b6388a36f1b7741193928c4a4_0.webp)
